name: TCA9548A I²C Multiplexer
description: The TCA9548A component allows you to use TCA9548A as a I²C multiplexer ([datasheet](https://www.ti.com/lit/ds/symlink/tca9548a.pdf), [AdaFruit](https://learn.adafruit.com/adafruit-tca9548a-1-to-8-i2c-multiplexer-breakout)) in ESPHome. It uses [I²C Bus](https://esphome.io/components/i2c) for communication.

config_entries.label: Address
config_entries.description: The I²C address of the Multiplexer. Defaults to `0x70`.

config_entries.label: I2C ID
config_entries.description: The I²C Bus ID Defaults to `false`

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: The id to use for this TCA9548A component.

config_entries.label: Bus ID
config_entries.description: The id to use for this virtual I2C Bus.

config_entries.label: Channel
config_entries.description: The channel (0-7) to use for this virtual I2C Bus.
